assertionResults.title: uses stable entity cache keys for detail conversations

assertionResults.title: builds dashboard summaries from the latest visible message

assertionResults.title: keeps the active dashboard conversation at its latest sorted position

assertionResults.title: does not rehydrate the active dashboard conversation while local messages exist

assertionResults.title: only warms inquiry/quote conversations when cache is empty

assertionResults.title: only warms active dashboard messages with access and missing cache
